description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story structure with a flat and gable roof combination, surrounded by a landscaped yard with trees, shrubs, and a small pool. The front facade is characterized by large glass windows and sliding doors, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection to the outdoor patio. The driveway leads to a parking area adjacent to the house, with a white fence enclosing the property. The rear of the bungalow includes a covered patio area and a small outbuilding, possibly a shed or garage. The exterior walls are finished in white with some green vertical garden accents, and the roof is dark gray. The property is well-integrated with greenery, blending modern architecture with a lush garden setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with large glass windows, a mix of flat and gable roofs, and a landscaped yard featuring trees, a pool, and a driveway with a white fence.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large glass windows, patio, and driveway with a car parked beside the house.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the green vertical garden wall, driveway, and a small outbuilding at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the covered patio, pool, and lush garden area with trees and shrubs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the plain white wall, driveway, and additional landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing windows and grouped side windows
